title: Exercises: Attack Vectors in Quantum Networks

exercises.title: Attack Impact Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze the impact of different attacks on QKD security.
tasks: Define attack catalog (blinding, trojan, PNS, etc.)
Calculate information leakage for each attack
hints: Some attacks give full key, others partial info

exercises.title: Detector Blinding Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate detector blinding attack and defenses.
tasks: Show Eve's control of detection events
hints: APD transitions to linear mode above threshold
In linear mode, only bright pulses register
Random efficiency tests can detect attack

exercises.title: Side-Channel Vulnerability Scanner
exercises.description: Scan for timing and power side-channels.
hints: Look for mean differences between operations

exercises.title: Network Attack Surface Mapper
exercises.description: Map attack surface of a quantum network.
tasks: Calculate blast radius of node compromise
hints: Each trusted node is a vulnerability
Single points of failure are critical
Consider both active and passive attacks
